title: 有馬記念の後に・世界、遠のいて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mejiro Dober runs with all she has, she
realizes how stark the difference in strength
between her and the senior racers is, and this
realization sends her into a depressive episode.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after the Arima Kinen, Mejiro Dober and
I watch a feature program on this year's classic
racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, they barely bring up Mejiro Dober.
Instead, all the commentators do is gush about
the achievements of past Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is frustrated by how far away she is
from the new Mejiro legacy she dreams of
forging, but that doesn't mean she's giving up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Carrying her promise with Mejiro Bright in her
heart, Mejiro Dober takes her first steps in
making her comeback at the Osaka Hai!
